title: Anchorage Heavy Rain
lead: Anchorage is experiencing a critical heavy rain event with a Z-Score of -4.34. This anomaly has a Score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme weather conditions.
body:
The current weather conditions in Anchorage are characterized by heavy rain, with an Umidita of 91% and Vento of 7.0 km/h. 
 The HDD is 16.2 GG, while the CDD is 0.0 GG, indicating a significant impact on heating requirements. 
 The Level is CRITICAL, requiring immediate attention and action to mitigate potential damages and disruptions.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to ensure public safety and minimize damage.
agri_impact: Crops at risk due to flooding
